mapper.sql: bo.id as org_id, bo.code as org_code, bo.name as org_name, bo.abbr as org_abbr
bo.code as org_code, bo.name as org_name, bo.abbr as org_abbr

bo.id, bo.created_time, bo.created_timestamp, bo.created_by, bo.created_id, bo.modified_time, bo.modified_timestamp, bo.modified_by, bo.modified_id, bo.deleted, bo.version, bo.remark, bo.status, bo.audit_status, bo.code, bo.name, bo.abbr, bo.uscc, bo.legal_person, bo.leader, bo.manager, bo.logo, bo.business_license, bo.mail, bo.mobile, bo.telephone, bo.country, bo.province, bo.city, bo.district, bo.detail_address, bo.website, bo.seq, bo.build_in_flag
mapper.select: select bo.id, bo.code, bo.name, bo.abbr, buo.checked, buo.id as userOrgId from `org` bo inner join user_org buo on bo.id = buo.org_id and buo.deleted = 0 inner join `user` bu on buo.user_id = bu.id and bu.deleted = 0 and bu.enabled = 1 and bu.locked = 0 and bu.account_expired = 0 and bu.credentials_expired = 0 where bo.deleted = 0 and bo.status = 1 and bo.audit_status = 2 and bu.id = #{userId} order by bo.name asc, bo.seq asc
